budget.policy: Use this packet first. Expand only listed specs/code/evidence when phase or stale revision requires exact source.

task.title: Harden verification gateway before dogfood checkpoint
task.summary: Implement a first-class CodeWiki verification gateway/router before relying on existing verifier evidence to close the stable refactor baseline and start dogfooding.

goal.outcome: Task closure and future sprint/release/drift checks use a robust verification gateway instead of ad hoc verifier prompts or parent-session confidence, using hardened context packs from the view/context-compiler work where needed.
acceptance: Define a `codewiki.verify`-style internal gateway/router contract with profiles, briefs, policies, and verdict schema.
Implement the `task-close` profile first and route `codewiki_task action="close"` through it.
Run deterministic preflight before semantic verification, including task goal fields, linked path existence, evidence/check presence, and view freshness where applicable.
Consume or define a compact verifier context pack instead of relying on ad hoc task prompt assembly.
Invoke semantic verification in a separate fresh read-only process/session/subagent with a complete CodeWiki verifier rubric and compact task brief.
Parse and validate verifier JSON strictly; malformed output returns `block` with evidence.
Add golden or smoke coverage for `pass`, `fail`, `block`, and malformed-output cases.
Ensure verifier cannot mutate canonical truth or generated views; parent remains sole writer for evidence and lifecycle changes.
non_goals: Do not implement all profiles in the first slice beyond contract stubs or documented routing.
Do not make verification depend on ThinkCode or any single runtime.
Do not close baseline refactor tasks using the old weak verifier path.
Do not solve the full sprint/roadmap context compiler in this task.
verification: Run `npm run typecheck` if required by touched TypeScript.
Manually exercise or unit-test `task-close` verifier outcomes for pass/fail/block.
Run `codewiki_state refresh=true` and confirm green health.

specs.title: Runtime Policy
specs.summary: Policy boundary for codewiki runtime access in codewiki.

specs.title: CodeWiki v2 Operating Model
specs.summary: Agreed v2 model for canonical truth, views, memory use, subagents, heartbeat, optional runtime tools, and sanitation.

specs.title: Task Loop Flow
specs.summary: Roadmap tasks route inner-loop execution from intent to implementation, verification, evidence, and closure.

specs.title: Lexicon
specs.summary: Shared CodeWiki vocabulary for agents, humans, tasks, and generated views.
